existing_pipeline.flow: Google Forms → Make.com → Apify → Claude API → Railway Flask → Gmail PDF

goal: Sell beta reports, collect proof, scale to full price, eventually build UI platform
product_description: A 17-section PDF report that scrapes and analyzes competitor ads from the Meta Ad Library using AI. Delivered automatically to the client inbox in under 10 minutes after filling a Google Form.
tone: Bold, credible, founder-to-founder, disruptive but educational
